description: Convert plan 2026-04-15 video upload/playback capability into iterative Ralph stories.

userStories.title: Video domain schema and runtime bindings
userStories.description: As a developer, I need video schema and bindings so video lifecycle state is persisted and configurable.
acceptanceCriteria: Add migration 0004_stream_video_assets with required video columns and indexes (unique stream_video_id, publish_status+processing_status, published_at).
Export video schema from db index and add STREAM_ACCOUNT_ID, STREAM_API_TOKEN, STREAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET in AppBindings.
Add schema tests for default statuses and duplicate/invalid constraint behavior.
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: From Unit 1; covers R3, R4, R5, R14.

userStories.title: Admin direct upload URL API and Stream client
userStories.description: As an admin, I need a signed direct-upload URL so browser uploads go directly to Cloudflare Stream.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement Stream integration client and POST /api/admin/videos/upload-url with admin auth and request validation.
Create local draft video record before issuing upload URL and return {videoId, uploadUrl, expiresAt}.
Handle missing Stream config and Stream API failures with structured errors and no dirty DB writes.
Add controller/service/integration tests, including unauthenticated access returning 401.
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: From Unit 2; covers R1, R2, R4, R5, R14, R15.

userStories.title: Stream webhook ingestion and status synchronization
userStories.description: As a system operator, I need webhook-driven status sync so processing state and metadata stay accurate.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement POST /api/webhooks/stream with secret/signature validation and mapping of Stream events to internal processing statuses.
Persist ready/failed metadata updates (duration, poster, status) idempotently when webhooks are retried.
Reject invalid signatures with 401/403 and keep video records unchanged.
Add webhook and service tests for happy path, replay/idempotency, and invalid signature paths.
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: From Unit 3; covers R3, R4, R16, R17.

userStories.title: Admin video lifecycle APIs
userStories.description: As an admin, I need list/edit/publish/unpublish/sync APIs so videos can be managed safely end-to-end.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement admin lifecycle endpoints for list, metadata edit, publish, unpublish, and sync-status.
Enforce publish gate so only processing_status=ready and publish_status=draft records can be published.
Set published_at on publish and ensure unpublished videos are no longer publicly eligible.
Add tests for publish happy path, non-ready rejection, duplicate publish semantics, and sync-status compensation.
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: From Unit 4; covers R6, R7, R8, R9, R14, R16.

userStories.title: Public video list API and cache invalidation
userStories.description: As a visitor, I need a public videos API that only returns published and playable videos.
acceptanceCriteria: Expose /api/content/videos with whitelisted fields and return only published+ready records.
Return [] when no records are available, and filter malformed records while logging warnings.
Use KV cache-aside strategy for list reads and invalidate cache on publish/unpublish actions.
Add controller/service/integration tests for visibility filtering and cache consistency.
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: From Unit 5; covers R8, R10, R12, R13, R15.

userStories.title: Frontend video API client and query contract
userStories.description: As a frontend developer, I need typed API/query integration so admin/public video flows use stable contracts.
acceptanceCriteria: Extend src/react-app/lib/api.ts with admin video and public list endpoints matching worker response contracts.
Extend src/react-app/lib/query-options.ts for video query/mutation options and invalidation keys.
Add api and query-options tests for field mapping, status semantics, and error mapping.
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Split from Unit 6 for smaller iteration size; covers API contract side of R10, R11, R12, R13.

userStories.title: Frontend admin videos UI and public playback modal
userStories.description: As an admin or visitor, I need management and playback pages so the full browser demo path works.
acceptanceCriteria: Create admin-videos-page with upload, status display, metadata edit, publish/unpublish, and sync-status actions.
Create videos-page with list rendering and modal playback using @cloudflare/stream-react.
Implement UI states for uploading, processing, empty list, and recoverable player error/close flow.
Add route wiring and page tests for happy path and key edge/error cases.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Split from Unit 6 for UI delivery; covers R10, R11, R12, R13.

userStories.title: Architecture and runbook sync with rollout guardrails
userStories.description: As an operator, I need updated docs and playbook guidance so deployment and rollback are safe and repeatable.
acceptanceCriteria: Update docs/core/technical-architecture.md with video module, APIs, status model, and webhook security model.
Update docs/runbooks/development-deployment-cicd-runbook.md with Stream config, smoke checks, and rollback procedure.
Update playbook references (current-state/workflows) to keep skill guidance aligned with implementation.
Document dev->prod rollout checks: upload URL issuance, webhook validation, publish visibility, unpublish invalidation.
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: From Unit 7; covers R14, R15, R16, R17.
